title: Construct Quad Tree
hints: Consider a recursive function that processes a subgrid defined by its top-left corner and size. The base case checks if all values in the current subgrid are identical.
If the subgrid is not uniform, recursively call the function for the four quadrants: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right.
When creating an internal node, set isLeaf to false and assign the results of the four recursive calls to the corresponding child pointers.
